wrong_art.issue: MAJOR — generic 3D-animated-movie-style crowd of unrelated characters, wrong art style entirely (not the established photographic look), no potato present, does not depict Segina/Sam/Cat/Dog/Rat/Ant/Pup
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate from scratch matching the established cast + style
wrong_art.mj_prompt: ultra-realistic photograph, a peg-doll girl in a red dress (Segina), a peg-doll boy in a red shirt (Sam), a tabby cat, a scruffy brown dog, a grey rat, a small ant, and a tiny bouncing puppy, all together celebrating at a hilltop under five glowing gold letters A E I O U arcing overhead like bunting, confetti falling, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: MODERATE — Ant is missing from the group despite the artNote requiring the full cast (pup, cat, dog, rat, ant, Segina, Sam); the Rat character reads as a lizard/monster rather than a recognizable rodent; Pup is hard to distinguish from Dog
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate or retouch to add a visible mud-splattered Ant and redesign Rat as a clearly rodent-shaped grey rat
wrong_art.mj_prompt: ultra-realistic photograph, a peg-doll girl (Segina) and peg-doll boy (Sam), a tabby cat, a scruffy brown dog, a small tiny bouncing puppy, a grey rat with a pointed rodent snout and long tail, and a small ant, all splattered with brown mud and laughing together, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
